install: set -e; if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then npm ci --no-audit; elif [ -f package.json ]; then npm install --no-audit; fi; if ! command -v mvn >/dev/null 2>&1; then if command -v sudo >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y maven; else apt-get update && apt-get install -y maven; fi; fi
